# server

Server-side SSR modules for the web UI: SQLite persistence, file watching, SSE streaming, WebSocket PTY bridge, and Leptos server functions.

## Contents

- [db.rs](./db.rs) — SQLite persistence via `sqlx`; `projects` and `documents` tables; pool at `~/.pas/web.db`
- [documents.rs](./documents.rs) — Watches `.pas/` for `prd.md`/`spec.md` changes; streams updates via SSE
- [execute.rs](./execute.rs) — Orchestrates decompose → scaffold → run pipeline; SSE progress events
- [mod.rs](./mod.rs) — Re-exports SSR modules; defines `AppState` with `db`, `watchers`, `terminal_sessions`
- [projects.rs](./projects.rs) — Leptos `#[server]` fns for project CRUD; directory browsing; `.pas/CLAUDE.md` scaffolding
- [stream.rs](./stream.rs) — In-memory SSE broadcast by `session_id`; `SESSION_STATE` replay buffer (max 100 events)
- [terminal.rs](./terminal.rs) — WebSocket PTY bridge for embedded Claude Code terminal; session persistence

## Integration Map

| Module | Database | Streaming | Pipeline |
|--------|----------|-----------|----------|
| `db.rs` | `SqlitePool` | — | — |
| `documents.rs` | `upsert_document`, `get_documents`, `get_project` | `broadcast::Sender<DocumentUpdate>` | — |
| `execute.rs` | `get_project` | `stream::publish_event` | `attractor_pipeline::{PipelineGraph, select_edge, default_registry}` |
| `projects.rs` | `SqlitePool` (all ops) | — | — |
| `stream.rs` | — | `broadcast::Sender<String>` | — |
| `terminal.rs` | — | WebSocket | — |

## API Surface

- `GET /api/stream/{session_id}` — SSE progress events (`stream.rs`)
- `GET /api/documents/stream?project_id=<id>` — PRD/Spec live updates (`documents.rs`)
- `WS /api/terminal?session=<id>&folder=<path>` — PTY terminal (`terminal.rs`)
- Leptos `#[server]` fns: `list_open_projects`, `open_project`, `close_project`, `get_cached_documents`, `list_directory`, `start_execution` (`projects.rs`, `execute.rs`)

## State

- `AppState { db: SqlitePool, watchers: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<i64, Arc<DocumentWatcher>>>>, terminal_sessions: TerminalSessions }`
- `CHANNELS: RwLock<HashMap<String, broadcast::Sender<String>>>` — per-session broadcast
- `SESSION_STATE: RwLock<HashMap<String, Vec<String>>>` — 100-event replay buffer

## Patterns

- **Watchguard**: `documents.rs` filters `notify::EventKind::Modify`/`Create` for `.pas/` only
- **Lazy watcher registry**: `get_or_create_watcher` caches `DocumentWatcher` per `project_id`
- **Dual delivery**: file change → SSE broadcast + SQLite persistence
- **Session resurrection**: terminal reconnects reuse existing PTY; server restart spawns fresh with new UUID

## Behavioral Contracts

- `.pas/CLAUDE.md` scaffolded on project open (40-line header constant `ATTRACTOR_CLAUDE_MD_HEADER`)
- `.pas/prd.md` and `.pas/spec.md` watched at exact paths
- `PAS_CLI_PATH` env var fallback for CLI binary path
- `sqlite:~/.pas/web.db?mode=rwc` — read-write-create mode
- Terminal resize: `{"type":"resize","cols":N,"rows":N}` JSON text frames

## Annex References

- `ATTRACTOR_CLAUDE_MD_HEADER` constant: [projects.annex.sum](./projects.annex.sum) (reproduction-critical)
